projects.title: Built AI-Niche Blog Website on WordPress
projects.description: Built 'Future of Work AI', a blog website from scratch on WordPress using Elementor, covering AI's impact on careers and industries. Configured SEO-friendly permalink structure, published 3 in-depth articles, and set up a fully functional homepage, blog, and contact page.
highlights: Set up WordPress dashboard, plugins (Elementor, WPForms), pages and posts from scratch
Chose 'Post Name' permalink structure for clean, SEO-friendly URLs
Diagnosed and resolved a domain hosting redirect issue independently

projects.title: Built E-commerce Store on Shopify (UrbanEdge Store)
projects.description: Built an e-commerce Shopify store for men's fashion accessories from scratch, covering dashboard setup, product listings, and store structure. Focused on product listing best practices and the role of the About Us page in building trust with ad platforms.
highlights: Structured product listings with compelling titles, HTML descriptions, compare-at pricing, and SEO tags
Learned how Google and Meta use the About Us page to vet ad account legitimacy
Mapped out future enhancements: custom domain, collections, shipping/payment setup, theme branding
